title: Women 60th Birthday Decorations Rose Gold Glitter Sixty & Fabulous Banner Balloons Happy 60th Birthday Party Decorations Glitter 60 & Fabulous Banner Bunting Kit by Wonsta
features: Wonsta 60th Birthday Decorations for Women: 6pcs 12” rose gold 60th birthday balloons, 6pcs 12” rose gold confetti balloons, 1 pack of rose gold 60th birthday bunting with 12 flags, 1 pack of rose gold Sixty & Fabulous birthday banner and 2 roll of 5m rope

Deluxe Rose Gold 60th Birthday Bunting Flags: 6pcs rose gold happy 60th birthday balloons, 6pcs rose gold confetti balloons, 1 pack rose gold 60th birthday bunting with 12 flags, it makes your 60th birthday party so outstanding. All balloons support helium or air.
Glitter Sixty and Fabulous Banner: It is deluxe rose gold glitter “Sixty & Fabulous” banner. It creats deluxe rose gold 60th birthday party atmosphere.

Easy to Use: these 60th birthday balloons are light and easy to carry, you can easily stick them to the wall or hang them anywhere you want. You can use these deluxe 60th birthday decorations to decorate the venue of your 60th birthday party, giving you a nice deluxe 60th birthday experience.

Perfect 60th Birthday Party Decorations: The unique 60th birthday banner balloons set is a great gift choice for loved 60th birthday decorations. It can be a great decoration for women’s 60th birthday.

Warm tips: Please avoid over-inflating the balloon, 90% of 12 inches is enough, and do not put the balloon under the spotlight, air conditioning and other heat sources, to avoid the balloon explosion because of uneven heat. If you encounter any problems in the process of use, you can always send us an email, we will reply you within 24 hours!
description: Rose Gold 60th Birthday Decorations Package Includes: 6 x 60th Birthday Balloons rose gold 12” 6 x Rose Gold Confetti Balloons 12” 1 x Glitter Sixty & Fabulous Banner 1 x 60th Birthday Bunting with 12 Flags 2 x rope Product Safety Information 1. This product containing balloons and small parts, not suitable for children under 8 years. 2. Do not put in the mouth to avoid eating. 3. This product must not be exposed to fire. 4. For use under adult supervision. Wonsta: To bright your life a little more!
